subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-17 in London
subcodes.first_line: Whenever a prophet would appear, people would say to them, 'We were enjoying ourselves in accordance with our own thoughts and desires…' … In the world of humanity, love is a manifestation of the splendour of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: همیشه در مقابل انبیا خلق می‌گفتند که بر حسب افکار و آمال خود بکیف مشغول بودیم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @outward and inward meanings, @call to action
